title: sterculia lastoursvillensis
intro: Sterculia lastoursvillensis, a plant species native to New Caledonia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Sterculiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sterculia lastoursvillensis include its potential to help manage various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
